# Gist

> Turn your app idea into a build-ready spec

Gist is a free tool that generates detailed, structured specifications for zero-stack web applications. Users describe their app idea, answer structured questions about functionality, data sources, and design preferences, then receive a markdown spec ready to hand to an AI coding assistant like Claude, Cursor, or Copilot.

## How it works

1. Choose your experience level (new builder or developer)
2. Answer questions about your app (what it does, data sources, hosting, design)
3. Download a markdown spec with architecture decisions, file structure, UX states, and implementation order

## Key details

- No signup required
- No cost
- Static site — all spec generation happens client-side
- Specs target free-tier hosting (Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, Netlify)
- Output is a single markdown file optimized for AI coding assistants

## Links

- Homepage: https://gist.1mb.dev
- Create a spec: https://gist.1mb.dev/create
- Source code: https://github.com/1mb-dev/gistapp
